calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion For An Order To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearances, the tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the Court: Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'s Motion for order to amend judgment is GRANTED so that judgment reflects debtor as Percy Duhon instead of Mercy Duhon. Without prejudice to Mr. Duhon moving for relief from default. (AJR/MD) Carol Karen CSR#8189
